name: magicsunday/coding-standard
description: Shared coding standard, static-analysis, test and CI configuration for the magicsunday/* projects.

suggest.shipmonk/phpstan-rules: Required for the opt-in strict PHPStan tier (phpstan/strict.neon): ^4.0
suggest.symplify/phpstan-rules: Required for the opt-in strict PHPStan tier (phpstan/strict.neon): ^14.0

scripts-descriptions.ci:test:php:lint: Syntax-check every PHP file via phplint (path-driven, not a hand-kept list).
scripts-descriptions.ci:test:json: Validate that every shipped JSON config parses.
scripts-descriptions.ci:test:templates: Fixture-driven cases proving the template lockstep gate accepts the canon and rejects every drift class.
